#include ../data/case69.txt
#include ../lib/idx_gen.txt
#include ../lib/idx_bus.txt
#include ../lib/idx_brch.txt
#include ../lib/make_y_bus.txt
#include ../lib/dSbus_dV.txt
#include ../lib/make_sdzip.txt
#include ../lib/make_sbus.txt
#include ../lib/newtonpf.txt
#include ../lib/runpf.txt

info(`Running power flow on case69...`);
for i in 0..100 {
    r = runpf();
}
info(`Run power flow on case69 end`);

assert_relative_eq(r, [
    [c(1,0)],
    [c(0.999966496612667,-2.14260998432163e-05)],
    [c(0.999932993225333,-4.28521996864740e-05)],
    [c(0.999839446730676,-0.000102723077640246)],
    [c(0.999020230375892,-0.000322695849537257)],
    [c(0.990084644631466,0.000852374183935299)],
